title: AN ACT GRANTING CONSUELO C. NAPANA A FRANCHISE FOR AN ELECTRIC LIGHT, HEAT AND POWER SYSTEM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BUENAVISTA, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN.

chunks.text:
H.No.61 / 46 OG No. 8, 3568 (August, 1950)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 508, June 13, 1950 ]

AN ACT GRANTING CONSUELO C. NAPANA A FRANCHISE FOR AN ELECTRIC LIGHT, HEAT AND POWER SYSTEM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BUENAVISTA, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1, Subject to the terms and conditions established in Act Numbered Thirty-six hundred and thirty-six, as amended by Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and thirty-two, and to the provisions of the Constitution, there is granted to Consuelo C. Napana, for a period of fifty years from the approval of this Act, the right, privilege, and authority to construct, maintain, and operate an electric light, heat and power plant for the purpose of generating and distributing electric light, heat, and/or power for sale within the municipality of Buenavista, Province of Agusan:

Provided,

That the holder of the franchise herein granted shall start operation thereof within one and one-half years from the approval of said franchise if she is not an actual operator; and within six months if she is already a holder of a municipal franchise. Failure to comply with this requirement shall

ipso facto

cancel and void the franchise.

SEC. 2. It is expressly provided that in the event the Government should desire to maintain and operate for itself the plant and enterprise herein authorized, the grantee shall surrender its franchise and will turn over to the Government all serviceable equipment therein, at cost.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 13, 1950.
